description: Complete system overview of the travel log service provider system, including high-level architecture and component interactions
Detailed documentation of service types, billing codes, and their associated business rules for travel, drug testing, and case management services
Implementation details of core calculation algorithms for transport hours, billable hours, indirect hours, and mileage costs across different service types
Documentation of how data flows through the system, including entry validation, hierarchical entry system, and processing of main/sub-entries
Detailed documentation of financial calculations, staff performance tracking, and service hour categorization algorithms
